courseTitle: Level Design, Spaces, and Encounter Craft
title: Annotated Festival Level
genericDescription: Present level design professionally; document intent and iteration; produce a shippable small level.
specificDescription: A polished festival level with playable route, annotated map overlays, beat chart markers, optional paths, and an explicit postmortem panel.
gradingRubric: 30 pts level quality; 20 pts professional documentation; 20 pts polish and playability; 15 pts iteration evidence; 15 pts portfolio presentation.
